primary.name: Deep Forest Green
primary.usage: Navbar, Hero headings, Primary buttons, Footer

secondary.name: Vibrant Green
secondary.usage: Hover states, Category icons, Accent elements

design_elements.borderRadius: rounded-3xl (large) for cards, rounded-xl (medium) for inputs
design_elements.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for primary buttons
design_elements.button_style: High padding, bold text, transition-all duration-300

grid.products: grid-cols-2 for mobile (essential for better UX), sm:grid-cols-2, lg:grid-cols-4
grid.gap: gap-x-4 (small) for mobile, sm:gap-x-12 (large) for desktop

spacing.container_padding: px-1 to px-4 for mobile devices, sm:px-8 for desktop
spacing.margins: mb-8 for mobile sections, mb-12 to mb-24 for desktop

typography.headings: text-2xl or 3xl for mobile, 4xl to 5xl for desktop
typography.body: text-[11px] or xs for mobile product names, sm:text-base for desktop
typography.tracking: Use tight tracking on mobile for long names

interactive.buttons: Large tap targets (py-2 or py-3), rounded corners for better feel
interactive.modals: Full height/width or high-percentage width on mobile, max-w-7xl on desktop
interactive.visibility: Use hidden/md:block for desktop-only elements like larger nav links
